meta.title: Life on Mars_
meta.sourceDoc: 75. P3 - Life on Mars 火星地球化改造.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Life on Mars_ 火星地球化改造

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：NO
PDF 定位：第1段末句："It is justpossible that, contrary to photographic evidence, Mars may be more promising than it appears.
PDF 解析：题干：PicturesofMars suggest itmightmakeagoodplace..（图片"暗示很 好")。原文说"与照片所显示的相反，火星可能比看上去更有前景"，即图片并不 让它看起来适合居住→与题干相反，故NO。

题目 28
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：第2段中部：you would notice someremarkableparallels between the atmosphere on Earth then and Mars today.
PDF 解析：原文只说"大气层存在显著相似(parallels)"，并未说"现代火星与远古地球整体外 观lookedremarkablysimilar"。题干把"相似"泛化为整体"外貌/外观"，信息 超出原文→NG。

题目 29
答案：YES
PDF 定位：第4段开头："At present, NASA is working on a system that willuse large mirrors... With a few changes, it might be possible to use similar mirrors to reflect the Sun's radiation and heat the surface of Mars.
PDF 解析：题于:involve adapting technology that is already under development。原 文：NASA正在开发的大镜面推进系统，稍作改动即可用于加热火星→"改造既 有在研技术"成立→YES。

题目 30
答案：NO
PDF 定位：第5段末句："Eventually,there would be enough oxygen on the planet for humans to breathe using only special apparatus similar to that used by mountain climbers."
PDF 解析：题干说"无需特殊设备"。原文明确仍需"类似登山者用的专门装置"，与题干 相反→NO。

题目 31
答案：YES
PDF 定位：第7段中部："it will stretch human ingenuity to its limits, and will require levels of will and commitment..
PDF 解析：题干"极端考验人类技能与智慧"。原文"把人类创造力推到极限"二极端考 验→YES。

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：D
PDF 定位：第2段开头："However,itdoeshavesomethings incommonwithourown planet.."（后举自转周期、轴倾角、元素等）
PDF 解析：D。A"距离不远"未提；B"没有其他生命"未提；C"寒冷干燥"是负面特征。

题目 33
答案：A
PDF 定位：第3段:"Terraforming... would initially create a greenhouse effect that would heat the planet, which in turn would create other conditions..
PDF 解析：首步是"让行星更暖"以产生温室效应→A。B"直接造可呼吸大气"是后续；C"先 找水源"未作首步；D"创造生存栖息地"也属后续结果。

题目 34
答案：C
PDF 定位：第5段中部:"The same factories would produce oxygen by mimicking the natural process of plant photosynthesis...
PDF 解析："工厂以类似植物的方式产生氧气"→C。A"控制温室气体水平"非该段重点；B"吸 收过量CO"未言"过量"，且核心是"产氧"；D"帮助细菌生长"对应的是"播种光 合细菌"但主体作用仍是"产氧"，题干问"工厂可用于做什么"，以C更精确。

题目 35
答案：C
PDF 定位：通读全篇，尤以第1-3、7段
PDF 解析：文章既谈"为什么或许需要"（人口、长期生存)，也谈"怎么做"(三法)，评估难度 要"过窄；B"阐明三步骤"不准确（并非三"步骤"，而是三"方法")；D"证明很容 易"与第7段相反。

questionSections.text:
题目 36
答案：I
PDF 定位：第6段开头："byfiring large,ammonia-bearing asteroids at the shoot planet."
PDF 解析：firing=shoot（向行星发射小行星)。

题目 37
答案：A
PDF 定位：第6段中部：..wouldmoveittowardsMarsat over10,o00mph.At cover this speed, it would take each asteroid about ten years to reach its destination."
PDF 解析：概述句中"to the enormous distances required"常规搭配 cover the distance.

题目 38
答案：C
PDF 定位：hit surface ...
PDF 解析：slam into = hit (撞击)。

题目 39
答案：B
PDF 定位：create 第6段:" The energy produced... would raise the temperature.. and melt..."
PDF 解析：撞击产生/造成(create）能量。

题目 40
答案：D
PDF 定位：increase 同上句
PDF 解析："raise the temperature" = increase the planet's temperature。
